title: Rajasthan BSTC Admit Card 2026 Out

detail.title: Rajasthan BSTC Admit Card 2026 Out
detail.short_info: Rajasthan BSTC (Pre DElEd) Admit Card 2026 has been released at predeledraj2026.com. Download your BSTC hall ticket using application number and password, and check exam date 20 May 2026, exam centre, shift timing and important instructions here.

content.text: Vardhman Mahaveer Open University (VMOU), Kota has released the Rajasthan BSTC (Pre DElEd) Admit Card 2026 on the official Pre DElEd portal. As per official updates and leading education portals, the BSTC admit card 2026 download link has been activated on 14 May 2026 for all registered candidates.

The Rajasthan Pre DElEd (BSTC) 2026 exam is scheduled for 20 May 2026, and candidates must carry a printed copy of the admit card along with a valid photo ID to their allotted exam centre. The admit card mentions exam date, time, exam centre and candidate details, and is mandatory for appearing in the entrance test.

headers: Telangana State Engineering Common Entrance Test (TS ECET 2026 / TG ECET 2026)
rows: Osmania University, Hyderabad on behalf of TSCHE
Lateral entry into 2nd year B.E/B.Tech/B.Pharm courses in Telangana colleges
Registration Number, Qualifying Examination Hall Ticket Number, and Date of Birth

sections.heading: How to Download Rajasthan BSTC Admit Card 2026

content.text: Candidates can download the Rajasthan Pre DElEd (BSTC) hall ticket 2026 by following these steps:

items: Visit the official BSTC Pre DElEd website: https://predeledraj2026.com (or predeledraj2026.in, as notified).
On the homepage, go to the “Pre DElEd (BSTC) Examination 2026” section and click on the “Download Admit Card” / “Candidate Login” link.
You will be redirected to the admit card login page. Choose the appropriate login option: Application Number & Password/Date of Birth, or Mobile No./Login ID and Password, as provided.
Application Number & Password/Date of Birth, or
Mobile No./Login ID and Password, as provided.
Enter your details correctly and fill in the captcha/security code, then click on “Submit / Login / Proceed”.
Your Rajasthan BSTC Admit Card 2026 will appear on the screen. Check your name, exam date (20 May 2026), exam time and centre details carefully.
Download the admit card PDF and take 2-3 clear printouts on A4‑size paper for exam‑day use and future reference.

content.text: If you face any difficulty in logging in or downloading the hall ticket, try again after some time or contact the helpline mentioned on the Pre DElEd portal.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on Rajasthan BSTC Admit Card 2026

content.text: After downloading, candidates must verify the following details on their BSTC hall ticket:

items: Candidate’s name and photograph
Father’s/Mother’s name
Application number/roll number
Exam name: Rajasthan Pre DElEd (BSTC) Entrance Exam 2026
Exam date: 20 May 2026
Exam time and reporting time (shift details)
Exam centre name, code and full address
Category and other candidate details, if printed
Important exam‑day instructions and guidelines

content.text: In case of any discrepancy in name, photograph, exam centre or other details, candidates should contact VMOU/Pre DElEd authorities immediately through the contact options available on the official website.

sections.heading: Documents Required with Rajasthan BSTC Admit Card 2026

content.text: On the day of the Rajasthan Pre DElEd (BSTC) exam 2026, candidates must bring:

items: A printed copy of the Rajasthan BSTC Admit Card 2026 (clear A4‑size printout, preferably colour or high‑quality black and white).
One original valid photo ID proof, such as: Aadhaar Card PAN Card Voter ID Driving Licence Passport Any other government‑issued ID accepted by the exam centre.
Aadhaar Card
PAN Card
Voter ID
Driving Licence
Passport
Any other government‑issued ID accepted by the exam centre.
Additional documents, if mentioned in the admit card/instructions (for example, PwD certificate and scribe permission letter for candidates availing scribe facility).

content.text: Without the hall ticket and valid ID proof, candidates may not be permitted to enter the exam hall.
